title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 19 -  2018: Organized and Cleaned

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a day spent entirely cleaning and organizing his home in Boulder — decks, bedroom, and bathroom. He mentions drinking a couple of Eggnogs (or similar drinks) the night before, staying up until 3am scrubbing, and looks forward to a washing machine delivery and a new gigabyte installation the next morning.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: feels good and necessary to get caught up on housework
drank moderately and spread it out to avoid a hangover
excited about getting it installed tomorrow

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today was the day that all I did was clean and organize.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had to get caught up on cleaning and organizing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I took everything off my shelves to make sure I know everything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I put everything back and organized it straight ahead and put stuff in the garage.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wasn't hungover at all this morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I woke up at 11 AM today.

claims.subject: Kyle

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I cleaned my deck and organized it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finished the day by scrubbing my bathtub and bathroom walls.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the store to get a scrubber and other cleaning supplies.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was busy all day long organizing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow morning between 8 and 10 AM, they will deliver my new washing machine and dryer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow morning, they are also going to install my new gigabyte.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to sleep now and let them install the machine tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't really get caught up with my own house until today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might film tomorrow since I haven't done enough filming lately.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have a new tour room and need to find my GoPro for the helmet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't do anything other than ride my bike across town a couple of times today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think it's good to keep yourself fresh and light.
